ddls:
CREATE TABLE "controllers" (
  "controller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VR controller */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the VR controller */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the VR controller */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the VR controller */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the VR controller */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Current battery level of the VR controller */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the controller's data was updated */,
  "is_connected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the controller is currently connected to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("controller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_controllers_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "controller_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "controller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VR controller */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session during which the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "frame_count" INTEGER /* Frame count of the data entry */,
  "acceleration" TEXT /* Acceleration vector of the VR controller */,
  "angular_acceleration" TEXT /* Angular acceleration vector of the VR controller */,
  "angular_velocity" TEXT /* Angular velocity vector of the VR controller */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position vector of the VR controller */,
  "rotation" TEXT /* Rotation quaternion of the VR controller */,
  "velocity" TEXT /* Velocity vector of the VR controller */,
  "is_tracked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the controller is currently tracked */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code if any error occurred during data collection */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message if any error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_controller_data_controller_id FOREIGN KEY ("controller_id") REFERENCES controllers ("controller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the VR controller manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Last date of contact with the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES controller_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "controller_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "controller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VR controller with the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in-progress, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes on the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_controller_issues_controller_id FOREIGN KEY ("controller_id") REFERENCES controllers ("controller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_controller_issues_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
